title: National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (Removal of Difficulties) Order, 2021
description: National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (Removal of Difficulties) Order, 2021
text: 6934 GI/2021 (1) xxxGIDExxx EXTRAORDINARY II (ii PART II Section 3 Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY I] 4544] 1, 1 10, 3 No. 4544] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 1, 2021/AGRAHAYANA 10, 1943 CG-DL-E-01122021-231515 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Financial Services) ORDER New Delhi, the 1st December, 2021 S.O. 4915(E). In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 46 of the National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development Act, 2021 (17 of 2021), the Central Government hereby makes the following order, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement. (1) This order may be called the National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (Removal of Difficulties) Order, 2021. (2) It shall come into force from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development Act, 2021, in section 15, in sub-section (1), the following proviso shall be inserted, namely :- directors nominated by the Central Government under clause (d) of sub-section (1) of section 6 [F. No. 18/7/2019-IF-I] LALIT KUMAR, Economic Adviser Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
